title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Blue Dart Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Blue Dart Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Distribution Manager looking for your next big career move? Blue Dart Global Group in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Blue Dart Global Group:
Blue Dart Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Dart Global Group!
